title: haplophyllum lissonotum
intro: Haplophyllum lissonotum, also known as the False Rue, is a small shrub plant native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Haplophyllum lissonotum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal tinctures and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
